title: Monthly Expenditures on Food and Non-Food Items Consumed by Rural and Urban Households, by Main Items, Iran 1965-1971 (in rials)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank); underlying data from Statistical Center of Iran (SCI) and Bank Markazi Iran
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1974_economic_development_vol4_statistical_appendix.pdf (Report No. 378-IRN, 'The Economic Development of Iran', Volume III: Statistical Appendix, October 14 1974), Table 9.1, page 71 (PDF page 79). Rendered to PNG via pdftoppm -r 200 and every value visually read from the image (not trusted from raw OCR, which was badly garbled on this scan). No value interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
units: rials per month per household (surveyed); household counts in raw count
notes: This is the earliest known Iran household-budget-survey micro-data table in this project -- predates the digital HEIS/IHEIS microdata era (see data/raw/iheis-microdata-metadata/, which is registration-gated and inaccessible directly). Source table footnote /1: 1965-1967 Urban figures are Bank Markazi Iran data (not SCI). KNOWN SOURCE-DOCUMENT INCONSISTENCY: the companion Table 9.2 (see wb1974-household-expenditure-composition-shares-1965-1971) reports different 'No. of households surveyed' for 1969 Rural (7,408 vs this table's 4,708) and for 1971 Urban/Rural (15,166/14,344 vs this table's 14,344/14,766) -- both numbers verified visually against the source page image, this is a genuine internal inconsistency in the original 1974 World Bank document, not a transcription error. Recorded as-is in both tables without silently reconciling.
retrieved_by: claude (manual transcription with visual verification, pdftoppm -r 200 render + Read tool)
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
